VJs TV is the global broadcast network for VJ culture, audiovisual performances, and digital visual art. Watch live performances, discover artists, and explore the world of visual performance.

AI Dome Experience

Technology

View All
The Tools Powering VJ Culture
BM
Hardware
Blackmagic Design

Professional video hardware manufacturer. DeckLink capture cards, ATEM switchers, and HyperDeck recorders are standard in VJ an...

Hardware staple of professional AV setups globally. Strong brand recognition across VJs, live event crews, and broadcast.
Used by: Professional VJsLive event crews
BL
3D & Motion Design
Blender

Free, open-source 3D creation suite. VJs and motion designers use Blender for modelling, animation, rendering, and creating vis...

Massive global community. Dominant free tool in visual arts education and independent VJ content creation.
Used by: Motion designersIndependent VJs
DG
Media Server
Disguise

Industry-leading media server and virtual production platform used in world tours, broadcast, and XR stages. Trusted by the big...

The gold standard for world touring productions. Direct access to top-tier touring visual designers and production companies.
Used by: World touring productionsBroadcast studios
